meaning: n.绿色,绿色颜料,绿色物品adj.绿色的,未成熟的,新鲜的,精力旺盛的,无经验的,青春的
examples: She was dressed all in green.
The group has been travelling, and waiting, with two groups of students driving ex-army Green Goddesses.
Greenopia calls it a leader in green food, recycling, biofuel research and carbon offsets for passengers.
